name: Barbecue Shrimp w/ Angel Hair Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup fat free Italian salad dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large heavy skillet, melt margarine.
2. Add the remaining ingredients (except shrimp and wine) and cook over medium heat until the sauce begins to boil.
3. Add the shrimp and cook for about 15 minutes.
4. Add the white wine and cook another 10-12 minutes.
5. Cook the pasta according to package directions, omitting salt and oil. Drain and set aside.
6. In a small pan, combine the remaining ingredients and sauté for a few minutes.
7. Pour over the pasta and toss.
